feed.title: Mantosh Kumar — Engineering Writing and Systems
feed.subtitle: Platform engineering, automation, backend systems, and operational intelligence.

entry.title: Evidence-First Engineering Knowledge System
entry.summary: Architecture case study for a production engineering publication with grounded AI retrieval, Cloudflare Workers, D1, Vectorize, and automated release gates.

entry.title: PhotoSahi: Privacy-First Browser Photo Processing
entry.summary: PhotoSahi is a privacy-first passport and visa photo generator that processes images locally in the browser with HTML5 Canvas.

entry.title: Validation Platform and Release Intelligence
entry.summary: A public, evidence-bounded case study on reusable validation infrastructure, AI-assisted failure investigation, and release intelligence for optical networking.

entry.title: Blockchain Without a Master Branch
entry.summary: A limited Git analogy for understanding blockchain as a distributed shared-history problem without a central source of truth.

entry.title: In Distributed Systems, Complexity Changes Address
entry.summary: A system-design heuristic for tracking the failure modes and operational responsibilities that an architectural simplification moves elsewhere.

entry.title: Engineering Philosophy: Build Leverage, Not Just Software
entry.summary: Four principles for choosing engineering interventions: start with the bottleneck, systematize repetition, preserve judgment, and keep evidence close to claims.

entry.title: Engineering Ownership Before Escalation
entry.summary: A practical communication standard for making material engineering issues, risks, and next actions visible before someone has to ask.

entry.title: Release Reports as Operational History
entry.summary: How comparable release-health reports can reveal longer-term engineering patterns while AI assistance remains accountable to human judgment.

entry.title: Why Does This Still Require Me?
entry.summary: A practical engineering heuristic for recognizing repeated work that should become a system, delegated responsibility, or automated workflow.

entry.title: GTT Price Calculator for Indian Stock Orders
entry.summary: A simple helper for preparing candidate buy and sell trigger prices for GTT orders in the Indian stock market.

entry.title: Workflow Automation Toolkit
entry.summary: A case study of local Python command-line utilities for repetitive PDF, image, and file-processing tasks.
